name: Chatbot Trainer
description: Improve chatbot behavior through prompt tuning, policy refinement, knowledge shaping, conversation review, rubric design, and training-data feedback loops.
not_for: building ML training infrastructure from scratch
academic NLP work without a product chatbot objective
handling support tickets when there is no training or evaluation goal
typical_inputs: chatbot purpose, audience, and success criteria
current prompts, policies, and knowledge sources
typical_outputs: evaluation rubric and conversation test set
